bottleneck.dry_run_status: API verification attempted as dry-run; live API payload unavailable.
bottleneck.main_bottleneck: SQL provides the answer source; API verification is dry-run/unavailable in the packaged trace.

journey_steps.name: Simple-prompt gate

journey_steps.name: Tokens/entities/domains
journey_steps.what_changed: Extracts schema/count intent for routing and SQL generation.

journey_steps.name: Query analysis
journey_steps.what_changed: Classifies the route and answer family for schema counting.

journey_steps.name: Lookup path / route intent
journey_steps.what_changed: Narrows to schema tables and schema API verification options.

journey_steps.name: Context card
journey_steps.what_changed: Packs the endpoint catalog/context into metadata and prompt budget.

journey_steps.name: Selected plan
journey_steps.what_changed: Selects a SQL-first plan with dry-run API verification.

journey_steps.name: Evidence objects
journey_steps.what_changed: Executes SQL for the answer count and records dry-run API verification.

journey_steps.name: Answer slots / intent
journey_steps.what_changed: Maps SQL count evidence into COUNT answer intent.

journey_steps.name: Verified final answer
journey_steps.what_changed: Verifies the SQL-grounded count and preserves dry-run honesty.

primary_example.api_status: API verification attempted as dry-run; live API payload unavailable.
primary_example.final_answer: You have 74 schemas. Live API verification was not executed because Adobe credentials are unavailable.
primary_example.main_bottleneck: SQL provides the answer source; API verification is dry-run/unavailable in the packaged trace.
primary_example.raw_prompt: How many schemas do I have?
primary_example.why_chosen: Primary SQL-backed packaged walkthrough: the prompt becomes validated SQL, SQL returns the answer count, and API verification remains dry-run/unavailable.
